name: Carousel
searchText: carousel embla based carousel component @mantine/carousel /x/carousel children controlsize controlsoffset emblaoptions getemblaapi getindicatorprops height includegapinsize initialslide nextcontrolicon nextcontrolprops onnextslide onpreviousslide onslidechange orientation plugins previouscontrolicon previouscontrolprops slidegap slidesize type withcontrols withindicators withkeyboardevents

props.name: children
props.description: Carousel.Slide components

props.name: controlSize
props.description: Controls size of the next and previous controls

props.name: controlsOffset
props.description: Controls position of the next and previous controls, key of theme.spacing or any valid CSS value

props.name: emblaOptions
props.description: Options passed down to embla carousel

props.name: getEmblaApi
props.description: Get embla API as ref

props.name: getIndicatorProps
props.description: Function to get props for indicator button

props.name: height
props.description: Slides container height, required for vertical orientation

props.name: includeGapInSize
props.description: Determines whether gap between slides should be treated as part of the slide size

props.name: initialSlide
props.description: Index of initial slide

props.name: nextControlIcon
props.description: Icon of the next control

props.name: nextControlProps
props.description: Props passed down to next control

props.name: onNextSlide
props.description: Called when next slide is shown

props.name: onPreviousSlide
props.description: Called when previous slider is shown

props.name: onSlideChange
props.description: Called with slide index when slide changes

props.name: orientation
props.description: Carousel orientation

props.name: plugins
props.description: A list of embla plugins

props.name: previousControlIcon
props.description: Icon of the previous control

props.name: previousControlProps
props.description: Props passed down to previous control

props.name: slideGap
props.description: Key of theme.spacing or number to set gap between slides

props.name: slideSize
props.description: Controls slide width based on viewport width

props.name: type
props.description: Determines type of queries used for responsive styles

props.name: withControls
props.description: Determines whether next/previous controls should be displayed

props.name: withIndicators
props.description: Determines whether indicators should be displayed

props.name: withKeyboardEvents
props.description: Determines whether arrow key should switch slides
